title: A Random Walk Down Wall Street - The Time-Tested Strategy for Successful Investing 11th edition 2015
note: SRC-006: This kind of scalping, called “front-running,” is a form of insider trading. If someone else is able to know that I want to buy 10,000 shares of a stock before I actually buy the shares, that’s insider information, and it should be illegal to trade on such information.
